dct_title_s: Descriptionis Ptolemaicæ augmentum : siue Occidentis notitia breui commentario illustrata, et hac secunda editione magna sui parte aucta
dct_alternative_sm: Descriptionis Ptolemaicæ avgmentvm : siue Occidentis notitia breui commentario illustrata, et hac secunda editione magna sui parte aucta
dct_description_sm: First 2 and last 2 pages blank (included in page description).
Engraved title page and head and tail-pieces throughout.
Index listing maps according to abridged titles (e.g.: "Chili" for "Chili Provincia Amplissima"), with added fol. page numbers, in ink.
Additional numbers in ink in upper right corner on pages 93-191, referring to folio index.

Map 1. Vtriusque hemispherij delineatio -- Map 2. Chica Siue Patagoni ca et Australis terra -- Map 3. Chili Provincia amplissima -- Map 4. Plata Americae Provincia -- Map 5. Brasilia -- Map 6. Peruani Regni descriptio -- Map 7. Castilia Aurifera cum Vicinis Provinciis -- Map 8. Residvvm Continentis cum Adiacentibus Insulis -- Map 9. Hispaniola Insula -- Map 10. Cuba Insula et Iamaica -- Map 11. Iucatana Regio et Fondura -- Map 12. Hispania Nova -- Map 13. Granata Nova et California -- Map 14. Limes Occidentis Quiuira et Anian -- Map 15. Conibas Regio cum Vicinis Gentibus -- Map 16. Florida et Apalche -- Map 17. Norumbega et Virginia -- Map 18. Nova Francia et Canada -- Map 19. Es Totilandia et Laboratoris terra.
